name: demand_multiplier
description: Demand-based multiplier computed by dbt (>1.0 = high demand)

name: units_sold_1h
description: Units sold in the last 1 hour (source window for demand calc)

name: dbt_updated_at
description: Timestamp when dbt last wrote this row — used for freshness monitoring

name: dbt_run_id
description: dbt invocation ID for lineage tracing in Datadog Data Jobs Monitoring
